name: Split Rock Golf CLub
address: 140 Wolf Hollow Rd, Lake Harmony, PA 18624
about: The Hub is a multi-venue entertainment space located in a building formerly used by Split Rock Resort, renovated in 2021/22 to offer a community-centric experience. It features a golf simulator alongside a pub, grocery items, wine and beer, food service, and two meeting rooms, creating a hybrid sports bar and recreational facility. The venue provides a central location for community members to gather for golf, dining, and social activities with amenities like live music and comfortable seating areas.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient location within a full-service venue offering food and drinks
Multi-purpose facility suitable for both practice and casual play
Accessible to a wide range of skill levels including beginners

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with a menu including breakfast, sandwiches, pizza, gourmet coffee, and homemade ice cream.
Full bar service with wine and beer available onsite. BYOB policy not mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Hub offers a family-friendly environment with food options and a casual atmosphere suitable for all ages.
